data.title: British government bond turmoil rekindles truss fears amid fiscal worries

data.title: PayPal co-founder and other tech tycoons are planning to build a new bank to serve crypto and AI startups and include stablecoins in their balance sheet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News PayPal co-founder Peter Thiel and several technology billionaires jointly launched a new bank called Erebor, aiming to fill the gap left by the collapse of crypto-related Silicon Valley banks. Erebor plans to serve venture-backed startups in the fields of artificial intelligence, encryption, manufacturing and defense, and has applied to the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency for a national banking license. The two co-CEOs are from software company Argus and crypto payment company Circle. The bank may include stablecoin assets, but details have not yet been announced. (Decrypt)

data.title: This Altcoin Looks Like PEPE Before It Exploded, Analyst Says
data.description:
A cryptocurrency analyst has pointed out how Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) is starting to look similar to Pepe (PEPE) did before its explosion. Pudgy Penguins May Be Following A Similar Path As PEPE In a new post on X, analyst Ali Martinez has talked about how PENGU is showing to the memecoin PEPE in its price chart. Below are the graphs shared by Martinez comparing the trends of the two side-by-side. In both charts, the analyst has marked the Fibonacci Retracement levels for the assets, lines that are based on ratios from the famous Fibonacci series
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/altcoin-looks-pepe-before-exploded-analyst-says/

data.title: 8 years ago, the whale who hoarded ETH transferred more than 4,100 coins to Gemini, worth about $10.51 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ember Monitoring, a whale who hoarded 21,600 ETH at an average price of about $569 8 years ago recently transferred 4,123 ETH (about $10.51 million) to Gemini when ETH was close to $2,600. This address has been transferred to Gemini since 2024, totaling 6,361 ETH (about $16.03 million), which has fully covered the cost. Currently, it still holds 13,500 ETH (about $34.94 million) in pure profit.

data.title: Opinion: If Robinhood succeeds, it will eliminate 90% of financial intermediaries
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Even Herd CEO Sam Jurrens posted on the X platform that if Robinhood's launch of stock tokens is successful, it will actually eliminate 90% of financial intermediaries, especially Robinhood's proposal to "tokenize everything for free" will accelerate this process. However, Bloomberg Senior ETF Analyst Eric Balchunas questioned Robinhood's propaganda, believing that although Robinhood's stock price has risen 338% in the past 12 months, if investors can already get everything for free through ETFs (investing in large regulated investment tools), there is actually no need to switch to Robinhood (24-hour trading or instant settlement is not an advantage, because 99.9% of investors don't care about these at all).

data.title: Hong Kong stocks Duodian Digital Intelligence once rose by 90%, has allocated BTC and plans to apply for a Hong Kong stablecoin license
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The share price of Hong Kong-listed company Duodian Shuzhi (02586) once soared by nearly 90%. As of press time, it rose by 45.38% to HK$13.
According to the financial industry, Duodian Shuzhi is preparing to apply for a stablecoin license in Hong Kong. Tang Yifan, the company's vice president and chief financial officer, said that the entry of virtual assets into the Web3 field brings huge opportunities, and the penetration rate of cryptocurrencies in global business continues to increase, and has become an important part of diversified investment. Duodian Shuzhi is optimistic about cryptocurrencies in the long term, has allocated Bitcoin, and actively promotes stablecoin and cryptocurrency strategies, while recruiting talents from leading companies in the industry such as Amber Exchange and Crypto.com.
In addition, in February this year, Duodian Shuzhi signed a strategic cooperation agreement with HashKey Group, and the two parties will cooperate deeply in the fields of digital asset trading, Web3 technology development and blockchain ecosystem construction. (Sina Finance)

data.title: Bitcoin Tests Consolidation Range Amid Growing Catalysts
data.description: According to Odaily, a report by 10x Research indicates that Bitcoin is currently testing the upper boundary of its consolidation range as macroeconomic catalysts accumulate. The report highlights strong inflows into ETFs and a continuous decrease in exchange balances, which are adding pressure on the Federal Reserve. Despite these developments, price volatility remains limited. The market may be building momentum for a potential breakout, coinciding with the traditional bull market season in July.

data.title: Whale Investor Faces Significant Losses Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
According to Foresight News, a prominent investor known as 'Insider Whale' has experienced substantial losses after a series of liquidations. Initially holding a $250 million short position, the investor's holdings have been reduced to $43.68 million following eight consecutive liquidations.

The investor initially committed $16.28 million as margin for the position, which has now dwindled to $1.2 million, resulting in a loss of approximately $15.08 million. Despite these setbacks, the investor has previously gained $26 million from three different addresses, maintaining an overall profit of $10.92 million.

Currently, the remaining positions include a 40x leveraged short on 237 BTC, valued at approximately $25.82 million, with an entry price of $106,697 and a liquidation price of $111,040. Additionally, there is a 25x leveraged short on 6,948 ETH, valued at $17.86 million, with an entry price of $2,452 and a liquidation price of $2,646.

data.title: Diverse Monetary Policy Stances Among Federal Reserve Officials
data.description: According to Odaily, a report from CITIC Securities highlights significant differences in monetary policy stances among the 12 voting members of the Federal Reserve. The report identifies four members as part of the dovish camp, including Federal Reserve Governor Waller, Vice Chair Bowman, Governor Cook, and Chicago Fed President Goolsbee. Six members, including the Federal Reserve Chair, hold a neutral stance, advocating for maintaining policy stability. Two members are identified as hawkish. The inclination of the Federal Reserve Chair remains crucial in current decision-making, with economic data changes being the key factor in determining whether the Federal Reserve will shift towards a dovish approach.

data.title: Sean ‘Diddy’ Combs, SBF’s Former Jailmate, Acquitted On Most Serious Charges
data.description:
Sean "Diddy" Combs has been acquitted of racketeering and sex-trafficking in Manhattan court while convicted on prostitution charges connected to Cassie Ventura. The rapper, once housed alongside Sam Bankman-Fried at MDC, now faces sentencing guidelines that could keep additional prison time to a minimum.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ean-diddy-combs-sbfs-former-jailmate-acquitted-on-most-serious-charges/

data.title: Algorand Dominates 70% of RWA Market as Stablecoins Surge 137% – Can ALGO Hit $0.20?
data.description:
Algorand has consolidated a 70% grip on the $24. 3bn real-world asset sector, recording $268. 2 m in tokenized value. Messari reports Q1 stablecoin capital on the chain has risen 137% to $135m, led by USDC, while new staking rewards have drawn more than two billion ALGO out of circulation
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/algorand-70-rwa-market-stablecoins-surge-137/
